title: U.S. macro and policy calendar
description: Hard scheduled U.S. macro and policy catalysts to reduce surprise and support posture, evaluation slicing, and carry rules.

events.title: FOMC meeting window ending 2026-01-28
events.notes_md: Decision typically arrives on day two around 2:00 p.m. ET; treat as event-imminent and event-live state, not as directional alpha.
